description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a prominent attached garage and a spacious driveway leading up to the main entrance. The facade features a covered porch supported by columns, and the entryway is flanked by symmetrical windows. The house has a gable roof with dormer windows, and the rear includes a large deck or patio area with outdoor seating. The landscaping includes a manicured lawn, a paved walkway, and blossoming trees, adding to the residential charm. The exterior is finished in light-colored siding with contrasting roof shingles and trim, and the windows are arranged in a balanced, orderly fashion.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, attached garage, covered porch, and landscaped yard featuring blossoming trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entrance with porch, driveway, and a blossoming tree on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage's side, the length of the driveway, and the blossoming tree at the front corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large deck or patio, backyard area, and multiple rear-facing windows and doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the garage, additional windows, and the continuation of the driveway and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with columns, steps leading to a single main door, and decorative trim.
